cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out how many 3-digit numbers have digits that add up to exactly 7. Let me start by understanding the problem. First, a 3-digit number ranges from 100 to 999. So the first digit (hundreds place) can be from 1 to 9, the second digit (tens place) from 0 to 9, and the third digit (units place) from 0 to 9.
